message:
🐛 Add null guards to STATUS_CONFIG and TYPE_ICONS lookups (#1545)

Add fallback handling for STATUS_CONFIG[status] and TYPE_ICONS[type]
lookups in MissionListItem, MissionChat, and Missions card components.
Prevents crash when missions loaded from localStorage have unrecognized
or undefined status/type values.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,9 +17,9 @@ export function MissionListItem({ mission, isActive, onClick, onDismiss, onExpan
   isCollapsed: boolean
   onToggleCollapse: () => void
 }) {
-  const config = STATUS_CONFIG[mission.status]
+  const config = STATUS_CONFIG[mission.status] || STATUS_CONFIG.pending
   const StatusIcon = config.icon
-  const TypeIcon = TYPE_ICONS[mission.type]
+  const TypeIcon = TYPE_ICONS[mission.type] || TYPE_ICONS.custom
 
   return (
     <div
